cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Killer
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sidney moves from hiding to actively confronting the killer, facing threats, attacks, and hostage situations, culminating in a final showdown where the orchestrator is revealed and she resolves the conflict.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In hiding, life in danger from a new killer linked to her mother's murder.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Free from past, departing calmly at sunrise after the threat is neutralized.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Initially, the killer's identity and plan; resolved by the end with Roman's defeat.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Unraveling Mother's Past
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sidney uncovers the truth about her mother's murder and secret life, from distressing nightmares and investigative clues to the revelation that her half-brother orchestrated the crimes.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mother's murder unsolved, causing distress and mystery.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Truth revealed by Roman, providing closure on her mother's past.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Why the killer targets her mother's memory; resolved when Roman explains his motives and connection.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bonds Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sidney's relationships with Gale and Dewey are tested through shared danger, leading to mutual support, protective actions, and a positive farewell after the crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Allies involved in investigation, relationships strained or supportive under threat.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Relationships affirmed, with a calm departure and farewell to Wallace.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Safety of allies during the crisis; resolved as they survive and Sidney ensures their protection.
